bootups.note: Boot-up / restart messages are not captured in the database. To enable this, the backend must persist each device boot/birth event (device id + timestamp) — e.g. a `deviceEvents` collection written when the modem reconnects. Then this panel can list devices with >1 boot/day and the boot times.
